name: Starcraft 2
description: StarCraft II is a science fiction real-time strategy video game developed and published by Blizzard Entertainment.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Game Difficulty
options.description: The difficulty of the campaign, affects enemy AI, starting units, and game speed.

options.label: Difficulty Damage Modifier
options.description: Enables or disables vanilla difficulty-based damage received modifier Handles the 1.25 Brutal damage modifier in HotS and Prologue and 0.5 Casual damage modifier outside WoL and Prophecy

options.label: Game Speed
options.description: Optional setting to override difficulty-based game speed.

options.label: Disable Forced Camera
options.description: Prevents the game from moving or locking the camera without the player's consent.

options.label: Skip Cutscenes
options.description: Skips all cutscenes and prevents dialog from blocking progress.

options.label: All In Map
options.description: Determines what version of All-In (WoL final map) that will be generated for the campaign.

options.label: Mission Order
options.description: Determines the order the missions are played in.

options.label: Maximum Campaign Size
options.description: Sets an upper bound on how many missions to include when a variable-size mission order is selected.

options.label: Two Start Positions
options.description: If turned on and 'grid', 'hopscotch', or 'golden_path' mission orders are selected, removes the first mission and allows both of the next two missions to be played from the start.

options.label: Key Mode
options.description: Optionally creates Key items that must be found in the multiworld to unlock parts of the mission order, in addition to any regular requirements a mission may have.

options.label: Player Color Terran Raynor
options.description: Determines in-game player team color in Wings of Liberty missions.

options.label: Player Color Protoss
options.description: Determines in-game player team color in Legacy of the Void missions.

options.label: Player Color Zerg
options.description: Determines in-game player team color in Heart of the Swarm missions before unlocking Primal Kerrigan.

options.label: Player Color Zerg Primal
options.description: Determines in-game player team color in Heart of the Swarm after unlocking Primal Kerrigan.

options.label: Player Color Nova
options.description: Determines in-game player team color in Nova Covert Ops missions.

options.label: Selected Races
options.description: Pick which factions' missions and items can be shuffled into the world.

options.label: Enabled Campaigns
options.description: Determines which campaign's missions will be used.

choices.value: Into the Void (Legacy of the Void: Epilogue)
choices.label: Into The Void (Legacy Of The Void: Epilogue)

choices.value: Whispers of Oblivion (Legacy of the Void: Prologue)
choices.label: Whispers Of Oblivion (Legacy Of The Void: Prologue)

options.label: Enable Race Swap
options.description: Allow mission variants where you play a faction other than the one the map was initially designed for.

options.label: Mission Race Balancing
options.description: If enabled, picks missions in such a way that the appearance rate of races is roughly equal.

options.label: Shuffle Campaigns
options.description: Shuffles the missions between campaigns if enabled.

options.label: Shuffle No Build
options.description: Determines if the no-build missions are included in the shuffle.

options.label: Starter Unit
options.description: Unlocks a random unit at the start of the game.

options.label: Required Tactics
options.description: Determines the maximum tactical difficulty of the world (separate from mission difficulty).

options.label: Enable Void Trade
options.description: Enables the Void Trade Wormhole to be built from the Advanced Construction tab of SCVs, Drones and Probes.

options.label: Void Trade Age Limit
options.description: Determines the maximum allowed age for units you can receive from Void Trade.

options.label: Void Trade Workers
options.description: If enabled, you are able to send and receive workers via Void Trade.

options.label: Ensure Generic Items
options.description: Specifies a minimum percentage of the generic item pool that will be present for the slot.

options.label: Min Number Of Upgrades
options.description: Set a minimum to the number of upgrade items a unit/structure can have.

options.label: Max Number Of Upgrades
options.description: Set a maximum to the number of upgrade items a unit/structure can have.

options.label: Mercenary Highlanders
options.description: If enabled, it limits the controllable amount of certain mercenaries to 1, even if you have unlimited mercenaries upgrade.

options.label: Max Upgrade Level
options.description: Controls the maximum number of weapon/armor upgrades that can be found or unlocked.

options.label: Generic Upgrade Missions
options.description: Determines the percentage of missions in the mission order that must be completed before level 1 of all weapon and armor upgrades is unlocked.

options.label: Generic Upgrade Research
options.description: Determines how weapon and armor upgrades affect missions once unlocked.

options.label: Generic Upgrade Research Speedup
options.description: If turned on, the weapon and armor upgrades are researched more quickly if level 4 or higher is unlocked.

options.label: Generic Upgrade Items
options.description: Determines how weapon and armor upgrades are split into items.

options.label: Kerrigan Presence
options.description: Determines whether Kerrigan is playable outside of missions that require her.

options.label: Kerrigan Levels Per Mission Completed
options.description: Determines how many levels Kerrigan gains when a mission is beaten.

options.label: Kerrigan Levels Per Mission Completed Cap
options.description: Limits how many total levels Kerrigan can gain from beating missions.

options.label: Kerrigan Level Item Sum
options.description: Determines the sum of the level items in the world.

options.label: Kerrigan Level Item Distribution
options.description: Determines the amount and size of Kerrigan level items.

options.label: Kerrigan Total Level Cap
options.description: Limits how many total levels Kerrigan can gain from any source.

options.label: Start Primary Abilities
options.description: Number of Primary Abilities (Kerrigan Tier 1, 2, and 4) to start the game with.

options.label: Kerrigan Primal Status
options.description: Determines when Kerrigan appears in her Primal Zerg form.

options.label: Kerrigan Max Active Abilities
options.description: Determines the maximum number of Kerrigan active abilities that can be present in the game Additional abilities may spawn if those are required to beat the game.

options.label: Kerrigan Max Passive Abilities
options.description: Determines the maximum number of Kerrigan passive abilities that can be present in the game Additional abilities may spawn if those are required to beat the game.

options.label: Enable Morphling
options.description: Determines whether the player can build Morphlings, which allow for inefficient morphing of advanced units like Ravagers and Lurkers without requiring the base unit to be unlocked first.

options.label: War Council Nerfs
options.description: Controls whether most Protoss units can initially be found in a nerfed state, with upgrades restoring their stronger power level.

options.label: Spear Of Adun Presence
options.description: Determines in which missions Spear of Adun calldowns will be available.

options.label: Spear Of Adun Present In No Build
options.description: Determines if Spear of Adun calldowns are available in no-build missions.

options.label: Spear Of Adun Passive Ability Presence
options.description: Determines availability of Spear of Adun passive powers.

options.label: Spear Of Adun Passive Present In No Build
options.description: Determines if Spear of Adun autocasts are available in no-build missions.

options.label: Spear Of Adun Max Active Abilities
options.description: Determines the maximum number of Spear of Adun active abilities (top bar) that can be present in the game Additional abilities may spawn if those are required to beat the game.

options.label: Spear Of Adun Max Passive Abilities
options.description: Determines the maximum number of Spear of Adun passive abilities that can be present in the game Additional abilities may spawn if those are required to beat the game.

options.label: Grant Story Tech
options.description: Controls handling of no-build missions that may require very specific items, such as Kerrigan or Nova abilities.

options.label: Grant Story Levels
options.description: If enabled, grants Kerrigan the required minimum levels for the following missions: Supreme: 35 The Infinite Cycle: 70 The bonus levels only apply during the listed missions, and can exceed the Total Level Cap.

options.label: Nova Max Weapons
options.description: Determines maximum number of Nova weapons that can be present in the game Additional weapons may spawn if those are required to beat the game.

options.label: Nova Max Gadgets
options.description: Determines maximum number of Nova gadgets that can be present in the game.

options.label: Nova Ghost Of A Chance Variant
options.description: Determines which variant of Nova should be used in Ghost of a Chance mission.

options.label: Take Over Ai Allies
options.description: On maps supporting this feature allows you to take control over an AI Ally.

options.label: Excluded Missions
options.description: Guarantees that these missions will not appear in the campaign Doesn't apply to vanilla mission order.

options.label: Difficulty Curve
options.description: Determines whether campaign missions will be placed with a smooth difficulty curve.

options.label: Exclude Very Hard Missions
options.description: Excludes Very Hard missions outside of Epilogue campaign (All-In, The Reckoning, Salvation, and all Epilogue missions are considered Very Hard).

options.label: Vanilla Items Only
options.description: If turned on, the item pool is limited only to items that appear in the main 3 vanilla campaigns.

options.label: Exclude Overpowered Items
options.description: If turned on, a curated list of very strong items are excluded.

options.label: Victory Cache
options.description: Controls how many additional checks are awarded for completing a mission.

options.label: Vanilla Locations
options.description: Enables or disables checks for completing vanilla objectives.

options.label: Extra Locations
options.description: Enables or disables checks for mission progress and minor objectives.

options.label: Challenge Locations
options.description: Enables or disables checks for completing challenge tasks.

options.label: Mastery Locations
options.description: Enables or disables checks for overcoming especially difficult challenges.

options.label: Basebust Locations
options.description: Enables or disables checks for killing non-objective bases.

options.label: Speedrun Locations
options.description: Enables or disables checks for overcoming speedrun challenges.

options.label: Preventative Locations
options.description: Enables or disables checks for overcoming preventative challenges.

options.label: Filler Percentage
options.description: Percentage of the item pool filled with filler items.

options.label: Minerals Per Item
options.description: Configures how many minerals are given per resource item.

options.label: Vespene Per Item
options.description: Configures how much vespene gas is given per resource item.

options.label: Starting Supply Per Item
options.description: Configures how much starting supply per is given per item.

options.label: Maximum Supply Per Item
options.description: Configures how much the maximum supply limit increases per item.

options.label: Maximum Supply Reduction Per Item
options.description: Configures how much maximum supply is reduced per trap item.

options.label: Lowest Maximum Supply
options.description: Controls how far max supply reduction traps can reduce maximum supply.

options.label: Research Cost Reduction Per Item
options.description: Controls how much weapon/armor research cost is cut per research cost filler item.

options.label: Mission Order Scouting
options.description: Allow the Sc2 mission order client tabs to indicate the type of item (i.e., progression, useful, etc.) available at each location of a mission.
